FlowDefinition.description: ** First Post CW Stage Evaluation Flow** When Opportunity is Closed Won, we wait 5 waits to update and sync the post close won stages on the opportunity based on data cross multiple objects - using the subflow. 03.28.2025 - Update entry condition for Gov Lic Opp to look at opportunities closed date Greater than 3.28.2025 FUTURE UPDATE REQUIRED IN PROD - Change Screendate = or greater than 4/1/2025 and Closed Date = 4/1/2025 or greater
FlowDefinition.masterLabel: Opportunity - After Save - First Flow to Post CW Stage Sync
